name: Ray's Atomic Wings
recipeIngredient: 3 lb To 4 lbs of chicken wings (cut up, washed thoroughly, and wing tips removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. After cutting up the chicken and washing it, make sure to dry it off thoroughly before deep frying.
2. Season the chicken parts with a little salt and pepper before deep frying.
3. Deep fry the chicken parts for about 10 minutes per batch or until golden brown.
4. Once all of the chicken is cooked, remove from oil and allow to drain on paper towels.
5. For the sauce: Mix the Durkee hot sauce with melted butter, salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, smoke hickory flavor, and crushed garlic in a saucepan over low heat until well combined.
6. Dip each fried chicken wing piece in the sauce, placing them in a casserole pan.
7. Pour any leftover sauce over the wings.
8. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 45 to 60 minutes, covering with foil during baking.
